query:
UPDATE core.runs
            SET last_heartbeat_at = NOW()
            WHERE id IN (
                SELECT r.id FROM core.runs r
                JOIN core.manifests m ON m.id = r.manifest_id
                WHERE m.name = $1 AND m.version = $2
                  AND r.status NOT IN ('failed', 'stopped')
                ORDER BY r.id DESC
                LIMIT 1
            )
